data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of Perlis & Kedah, Penang, Perak, Selangor, N. Sembilan and Western Sabah and Labuan until 6:00PM; Tuesday, 23 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan Perlis & Kedah, Pulau Pinang, Perak, Selangor, N. Sembilan dan Sabah Barat dan Labuan sehingga 6:00 petang; Selasa, 23 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of eastern part of Phuket, Northern Straits of Melaka, western part of Samui, northeastern part of Bunguran, Reef North, Reef South, Layang-Layang, Labuan, Palawan, Sulu and Sulawesi until 6:00PM; Tuesday, 23 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan timur Phuket, Selat Melaka Utara, barat Samui, timur laut Bunguran, Reef North, Reef South, Layang-Layang, Labuan, Palawan, Sulu dan Sulawesi sehingga 6:00 petang; Selasa, 23 Jun 2026.

data.heading_en: Warning on Strong Wind and Rough Seas (First Category)
data.text_en: Strong westerly winds of 40-50 kmph with wave height up to 3.5 metres are expected over the waters of Phuket until Saturday, 27 June 2026.
data.heading_bm: Amaran Angin kencang dan laut bergelora (Kategori Pertama)
data.text_bm: Angin kencang barat berkelajuan 40-50 kmsj dengan ombak mencapai ketinggian sehingga 3.5 meter dijangka di kawasan perairan Phuket sehingga Sabtu, 27 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the states of  Perlis ;  Kedah ;  Penang ;  Perak  (Kerian, Larut, Matang and Selama, Hulu Perak, Kuala Kangsar, Manjung, Kinta, Perak Tengah and Kampar);  Pahang  (Cameron Highlands); and  Sarawak:  Kapit (Kapit, Bukit Mabong and Belaga), Bintulu (Tatau and Sebauh), Miri (Beluru, Miri and Marudi) and Limbang (Limbang) until 4:00PM; Tuesday, 23 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di negeri  Perlis ;  Kedah ;  Pulau Pinang ;  Perak  (Kerian, Larut, Matang Dan Selama, Hulu Perak, Kuala Kangsar, Manjung, Kinta, Perak Tengah dan Kampar);  Pahang  (Tanah Tinggi Cameron); dan  Sarawak:  Kapit (Kapit, Bukit Mabong dan Belaga), Bintulu (Tatau dan Sebauh), Miri (Beluru, Miri dan Marudi) dan Limbang (Limbang) sehingga 4:00 petang; Selasa, 23 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: Category:  Typhoon Advisory (MEKKHALA)                  Time of Observation:  11:00, 23 June 2026                  Location:  Latitude 19.1 North and Longitude 124.9 East                  Movement:  Northwest 10 km/h.                  Maximum wind speed:  185 km/h                  Distance from nearest international city:  approximately 472 km Northeast of Luzon, Philippines.                  Distance from nearest Malaysian city:  Approximately 1615 km Northeast of Sandakan, Sabah.                  Threat to Malaysia:  No significant impact.
data.text_bm: Kategori:  Nasihat Taufan (MEKKHALA)                  Masa Pencerapan:  11:00, 23 Jun 2026                  Kedudukan:  Latitud 19.1 Utara dan Longitud 124.9 Timur                  Pergerakan:  Ke arah Barat Laut dengan kelajuan 10 km/j.                  Kelajuan angin maksimum:  185 km/j                  Jarak dari bandar antarabangsa terdekat:  kira-kira 472 km ke Timur Laut Luzon, Philippines.                  Jarak dari bandar terdekat:  Kira-kira 1615 km ke Timur Laut Kudat, Sabah.                  Kesan terhadap Malaysia:  Tiada kesan signifikan.
